name: galaxy-selfevolve / FutureX runner
usage: daily Hormuz question generation, forecast run trace, and checkpoint handoff
caveat: This is the local research runner; browser UI reads only its normalized artifact and does not display raw prompts or chain-of-thought.

name: EIA / IEA Hormuz baseline
usage: structural oil transit baseline and bypass capacity range
caveat: 这是 chokepoint 结构性基线，不是实时船流或当日 throughput；精确拆分必须绑定可审计原始表。

name: Natural Earth
usage: country boundaries and regional coastline context
caveat: 适合静态地理边界，不是 nautical chart，也不代表实时航行风险。

name: Global Shipping Lanes
usage: public lane geometry around Hormuz
caveat: 展示主干航线结构；不是实时 AIS，也不含船舶逐点轨迹。
crossChecks: route coordinates clipped to Gulf of Oman / Hormuz bounds

name: IMF PortWatch · Strait of Hormuz
usage: public transit calls / Arrivals of Ships metric for traffic-normal questions
caveat: AIS-derived flow metric; PortWatch warns about GPS jamming, AIS spoofing, vessels going dark, and revised data points.
crossChecks: licensed AIS or SAR cross-check for production

name: IMO monthly Hormuz transits
usage: monthly average daily transits through the Strait of Hormuz for traffic-flow cross-checks
caveat: IMO currently publishes the monthly values as chart images; numeric extraction requires OCR or manual review before evidence use.

name: Polymarket · Hormuz traffic market
expectedLatency: real time market; source data resolves later
usage: external question template for traffic-normal forecast and market-implied consensus comparison
caveat: Live prices are not imported into canonical state without a dated snapshot; the page defines a question, not verified evidence.
crossChecks: do not treat market odds as ground truth

name: Polymarket curated question refs
expectedLatency: real time market; source data resolves later
usage: external prediction-market reference questions for the Overview Polymarket card
caveat: External market, not our forecast; odds are reference values only and never enter EvidenceClaim, canonical_inputs, or forecast state.
crossChecks: Polymarket event rules and question page

name: FRED market series
usage: Brent/WTI spot proxies, Broad USD, USD/CNY, US10Y, VIX, S&P 500, NASDAQ Composite, and US CPI local history
caveat: 页面展示为本地抽样快照，不是 live endpoint；Brent/WTI 是 spot proxy，不是 futures 主连；CPI 为月频滞后序列。

name: Stooq · XAU/USD daily OHLC
usage: 1y Gold XAU/USD safe-haven history in Market
caveat: XAU/USD daily OHLC history; Market chart uses Close as a spot proxy, not LBMA benchmark history and not a futures continuous contract.

name: UKMTO / JMIC / MARAD advisory
usage: official maritime advisory escalation trigger
caveat: 官方措辞变化才应触发概率更新；媒体转述只作为 candidate evidence。

name: Curated Hormuz events timeline
usage: News timeline, Overview latest events, and Market event overlays
caveat: Timeline entries describe sourced events only; they do not imply forecast probability, scenario movement, or judgement updates.

name: AIS flow source pending
usage: flow-watch UI placeholder until licensed AIS or stable public snapshot exists
caveat: 当前不是授权实时 AIS；数值只用于 demo，不进入真实 forecast evidence。
crossChecks: do not treat Shipxy-style UI as data source

name: GDELT DOC 2.0 news discovery
usage: machine-ingested candidate pool for Hormuz / Iran / Gulf of Oman media events
caveat: GDELT rows are candidates only; they must be promoted into events_timeline before UI use and never enter forecast evidence directly.
crossChecks: manual interactive review for non-allowlisted domains

name: BaseAgent via apihy
usage: interactive explanation and forecast note generation
caveat: 当前是 dev proxy + fallback；生产应迁到 galaxy / galaxy-selfevolve backend。

name: Crude futures continuous source
usage: Brent and WTI continuous futures once a stable licensed provider is wired
caveat: 未接入前只能展示 FRED spot proxy；不能把 futures 主连写成静态网页数据。

name: Gold daily source
usage: safe-haven channel once stable source is wired
caveat: 未接入前保持 pending，不生成虚假走势。

name: Silver daily source
usage: safe-haven / precious-metals channel once stable source is wired
caveat: 未接入前保持 pending，不生成虚假白银走势。
crossChecks: licensed or open daily silver source

name: USD/CNH daily source
usage: offshore RMB channel once stable daily source is wired
caveat: 未接入稳定源前保持 pending，不生成 live USD/CNH 走势或高置信判断。

name: Hang Seng Tech index source
usage: Hong Kong growth / China risk-asset context once stable source is wired
caveat: 未接入前保持 pending，不生成静态指数走势。

name: Shanghai Composite index source
usage: Mainland China risk-asset context once stable source is wired
caveat: 未接入前保持 pending，不生成静态指数走势。

name: ACLED conflict events
usage: candidate conflict event layer for escalation probability targets
caveat: 进入预测前仍需地理、时间戳和事件类型核验；不能替代官方海事通告。

name: UCDP GED
usage: historical baseline, label design, and backtest reference
caveat: 不是 live trigger；不能作为当前 7d/14d escalation target 主证据。
